positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    single_seat_electric_car(john_car)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~one_seater(X0) | ~can_transport_multiple(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~single_seat_electric_car(X0) | one_seater(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~tesla_model3(X0) | can_transport_multiple(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~can_transport_multiple(john_car)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    one_seater(john_car)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define solo_ev(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u27,axiom,
    single_seat_electric_car(john_car)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~tesla_model3(X0) | can_transport_multiple(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~solo_ev(X0) | single_seat_electric_car(X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~one_seater(X0) | ~can_transport_multiple(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~single_seat_electric_car(X0) | one_seater(X0)).

cnf(u19,negated_conjecture,
    solo_ev(john_car)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    one_seater(john_car)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~can_transport_multiple(john_car)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
